name: Vdisplay
summary: Manage virtual displays through URI routes.
description: Vdisplay is an if-uri urirun connector for manage virtual displays through URI routes. It is represented in the public catalog so the connector can be discovered, versioned and linked to its repository while implementation details are completed.
useCases: Discover Vdisplay capabilities from the connector catalog.
Plan flows that use vdisplay:// URI routes.
Install or track the connector from its GitHub repository.
